case_title: JOEL CARRON VS. NORCAL HOLDINGS LLC

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION PLAINTIFF JOEL CARRON IS PREENT. DEFENDANT NORCAL HOLDINGS LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY THONAS IVELI, MANAGERING PARTNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
ORDER ON REQUEST FO COURT ORDERS IS DENIED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-18-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NORCAL HOLDINGS LLC
